name: McpSession-PowerShell
description: PowerShell module for the MCP Session Log API. Provides cmdlets: Initialize-McpSession, New-McpSessionLogSlug, New-McpSessionLog, Update-McpSessionLog, Get-McpSessionLog, Add-McpSessionTurn, Set-McpSessionTurn, Add-McpAction, Add-McpTurnDetail, Send-McpDialog. Persists and submits canonical turns-only session-log payloads. Save to McpSession.psm1 and Import-Module.
commandTemplate: Save this module to McpSession.psm1, then: Import-Module ./McpSession.psm1; Initialize-McpSession
